title: Confident and on his knees
caption:
A man of faith can look any man in the eye and still kneel. That's the paradox the world never teaches.

The world says confident or humble. Scripture says both — and shows you a man who led armies and wept in gardens, who flipped tables and washed feet.

Four things that hold the paradox together — swipe.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #humility #confidence #manofgod #bibleverses #proverbs #spiritualgrowth #christianliving
